**Do not submit the project if**
Do not submit the project if:
* age of the project is less than half a year
* the project is not standalone, meaning it requires remote service to operate. There is exclusion to that rule: packages to access anti-catpcha services can be put in my list.

**Link to the github repository**
Put here plain text link to github repository of the project

***SHORT description, not more than 500 symbols.***
Provide simple TEXT ONLY description of the project. No more than 500 symbols. DO NOT USE EMOJIS. DO NOT USE LINKS. DO NOT USE ITEMS LIST.

**Category to put this project into**
Provide ONE category in which the project must be placed in. To get idea about what category to choose, check out [python](https://github.com/lorien/awesome-web-scraping/blob/master/python.md) list.
